sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ لَيْلَى فِي مَكْتَبٍ حَدِيثٍ وَسَطَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla radi u modernoj kancelariji u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: Layla works in a modern office downtown.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ عَمَلَهَا فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا بِنَشَاطٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Svoj posao započinje u osam sati ujutro sa velikom energijom.
sentences.translationEn: She starts her work at eight in the morning with great energy.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ بِتَنْظِيمِ الْمَوَاعِيدِ وَالرَّدِّ عَلَى رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ona organizuje sastanke i odgovara na e-mailove.
sentences.translationEn: She organizes appointments and replies to emails.

sentences.arabic: تُفَضِّلُ لَيْلَى شُرْبَ الْقَهْوَةِ السَّاخِنَةِ أَثْنَاءَ تَنْفِيذِ مَهَامِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Lejla voli piti toplu kafu dok obavlja svoje zadatke.
sentences.translationEn: Layla prefers drinking hot coffee while performing her tasks.
